meta.description: "I'm Dexter, a Graphic Designer working on my BFA at Portland State University. Currently most of my energy goes towards web design, branding, and game design. "

children.value: I'm Dexter, a Graphic Designer working on my BFA at Portland State University. Currently most of my energy goes towards web design, branding, and game design.
The best part of graphic design for me is people. I enjoy working with both designers and non-designers. Send me an email with a smiley face, or your latest project. I'm always eager to chat.
Thanks for looking! This is a place holder site until I get my actual site up and running, for now my portfolio is just a PDF.

Heres some writing about AnnexNews I did a lot of blah blah. I even managed the newspaper and contributed. You know what color the next issue will be? well I don't at all and we should probably figure that out pretty soon.
